---
title: "About"
---

The Generation of Participation in Democracy was founded
by [Dr. Matthew A. Turner](https://mat.phd) as a center of innovation to secure the
foundations of a shared sustainable future for all Americans—which here
means every resident of South or North America, in agreement and solidarity with
Benito Bunny.

!["Together We Are America"](BenitoBunny.png){width=600px .lightbox}


### Democracy Needs Sustainability {#democracy-and-sustainability}

To make _sustainability_ concrete, we adopt the outlined in seventeen
pillars by the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), which I
organize in what I call the **Sustainability VIBE**: sustainability happens
when Vibrant _Institutions_ provide the _Basic_ requirements for 
_Environmental_ or _Ecological_ protections. Those institutions work best when
those affected by the institutional decisions control those institutions, 
which can only happen when basic needs are met.

![Catch the Sustainability VIBE](VIBE-illustration.png){width=700px .lightbox}
